name: UVHelper
summary: The UV Helper class contains methods allowing you to determine the location (UV coordinates) of a texture on a face. This class is particularly useful in determining how textures that have been manipulated using the Texture Tweaker should appear when exported to another file type Use the Face.get_UVHelper method to create a UVHelper for a given face. See the TextureWriter class as well.

methods.name: get_back_UVQ
methods.summary: Note: To convert UVQ coordinates to UV, divide U and V by Q.
methods.remarks: Note: To convert UVQ coordinates to UV, divide U and V by Q. The #get_back_UVQ method is used to get the UV texture coordinates on the back of a face.

returns.doc: Point where X represents U, Y represents V and Z represents Q.

methods.name: get_front_UVQ
methods.summary: Note: To convert UVQ coordinates to UV, divide U and V by Q.
methods.remarks: Note: To convert UVQ coordinates to UV, divide U and V by Q. The #get_front_UVQ method is used to get the UV texture coordinates on the front of a face.

returns.doc: Point where X represents U, Y represents V and Z represents Q.
